intent_contract.task_statement: Choose the source packet for the export exception response.
success_criteria: Use the signed approval packet that directly authorizes the export exception.
Preserve provenance for the selected packet.
hard_constraints: Do not use planning email as the exception record.
soft_preferences: Prefer the packet that can be attached directly to the export response.
forbidden_actions: Cite an unsigned planning email as the export exception record.
allowed_scope_expansions: You may mention that planning email informed the discussion but not the approval.
evidence_requirements: The selected packet must authorize the exception directly.
stop_conditions: Stop after choosing one source packet.

corpus.title: Signed export exception packet
corpus.text: Signed packet: trade compliance and legal approved the export exception for shipment EX-44.

corpus.title: Planning email
corpus.text: Email: ops expects the exception to go through and asks the team to prepare shipment EX-44.
